name: Missed 2 days work after minor cut, do I qualify for comp?
description: Yes, medical always; wages if off longer.[2]

mainEntity.name: Missed 2 days work after minor cut, do I qualify for comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, medical always; wages if off longer.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes if work-related; covers medical even short absences.[2] Key factors: Report, doctor note.[1] Wage loss after waiting period.[1] All injuries qualify.[2] File anyway.[1]
